com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.emvl2.listener

Interface EmvJNIListener


  • public interface EmvJNIListener
    A listener used to monitor EMV events.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int after_final_select(byte[] aid, int aidLen, byte[] tlvData, int[] tlvDataLen)
      After final select.
      int candidate(java.util.ArrayList<candidate_clss> candidateList)
      Display AID candidate list, let user choose an AID.
      int checkCRL(crlEntry crl)
      Check if the issuer public certificate in the revocation list.
      int checkExceptionList(byte[] pan, int panSn)
      Check the card in the exception list.
      int dek_det(byte messageType, byte[] data, int[] dataLen)
      Use in Paypass dek and det.
      int emvDebug(byte[] log, int logLen)
      Output EMV Debug log.
      int exchangeAPDU(byte[] rAPDU, int[] rAPDULen, byte[] cAPDU, int cAPDULen)
      ICC exchange APDU data.
      int get_apdu_data(int cardInterface, byte[] reqAPDU, int reqLength, byte[] rspAPDU, int rspLength)
      Get APDU data.
      int getAidTlvList(aidlist_clss terminalAid, byte[] aidList, int[] aidListLen)
      Get AID configuration.
      int getCapk(capk capk, byte[] rid, int index)
      Get CAPK according to RID and CAPK index.
      int getOnlinePIN()
      Require user to enter password.
      int powerDown()
      Contact card power down.

    • Method Detail

      • emvDebug

        int emvDebug(byte[] log,
             int logLen)
        Output EMV Debug log.
        Parameters:
        log - [IN] EMV debug log.
        logLen - [IN] The length of log.
        Returns:
        Result code.

      • getOnlinePIN

        int getOnlinePIN()
        Require user to enter password.
        Returns:
        Result code.

      • getAidTlvList

        int getAidTlvList(aidlist_clss terminalAid,
                  byte[] aidList,
                  int[] aidListLen)
        Get AID configuration.
        Parameters:
        terminalAid - [IN] The final select AID.
        aidList - [OUT] The final select AID configuration data.
        aidListLen - [OUT] The final select AID configuration data length.
        Returns:
        Result code.

      • checkExceptionList

        int checkExceptionList(byte[] pan,
                       int panSn)
        Check the card in the exception list.
        Parameters:
        pan - [IN] PAN
        panSn - [IN] PAN SN. If SN == 0xFF, it will not check SN.
        Returns:
        • 1: Yes
        • 0: No

      • getCapk

        int getCapk(capk capk,
            byte[] rid,
            int index)
        Get CAPK according to RID and CAPK index.
        Parameters:
        capk - [OUT] Certification Authority Public Key.
        rid - [IN] Registered Application Provider Identifier, 5 bytes.
        index - [IN] Certification Authority Public Key Index.
        Returns:
        • 0: Get CAPK successfully.
        • <0: Any error for getting CAPK.

      • checkCRL

        int checkCRL(crlEntry crl)
        Check if the issuer public certificate in the revocation list.
        Parameters:
        crl - [IN] Certificate Revocation List, RID + CAPK INDEX + CSN.
        Returns:
        • 0: Can't find the certificate in CRL.
        • 1: Find the certificate in CRL.

      • exchangeAPDU

        int exchangeAPDU(byte[] rAPDU,
                 int[] rAPDULen,
                 byte[] cAPDU,
                 int cAPDULen)
        ICC exchange APDU data.
        Parameters:
        rAPDU - [OUT] Response data of APDU command including 2 bytes of status word.
        rAPDULen - [OUT] The length of received APDU data.
        cAPDU - [IN] Request data of APDU command.
        cAPDULen - [IN] The length of request APDU data.
        Returns:
        • 0: Perform ICC command successful.
        • <0: Any ICC error.

      • candidate

        int candidate(java.util.ArrayList<candidate_clss> candidateList)
        Display AID candidate list, let user choose an AID.
        Parameters:
        candidateList - AID candidate list.
        Returns:
        Result code.

      • powerDown

        int powerDown()
        Contact card power down.
        Returns:
        Result code.

      • dek_det

        int dek_det(byte messageType,
            byte[] data,
            int[] dataLen)
        Use in Paypass dek and det.
        Parameters:
        messageType - [IN] Message type.
        • 0x01: dek
        • 0x02: det
        data - [IN/OUT] The dek or det value.
        dataLen - [IN/OUT] The dek or det value length.
        Returns:
        • 0: Success
        • -1: Failed

      • after_final_select

        int after_final_select(byte[] aid,
                       int aidLen,
                       byte[] tlvData,
                       int[] tlvDataLen)
        After final select.
        Parameters:
        aid - AID data.
        aidLen - AID data length.
        tlvData - TLV data.
        tlvDataLen - TLV data length.
        Returns:
        Result code.

      • get_apdu_data

        int get_apdu_data(int cardInterface,
                  byte[] reqAPDU,
                  int reqLength,
                  byte[] rspAPDU,
                  int rspLength)
        Get APDU data.
        Parameters:
        cardInterface - Card interface.
        reqAPDU - Request APDU data.
        reqLength - Length of request APDU data.
        rspAPDU - Response APDU data.
        rspLength - Length of response APDU data.
        Returns:
        Result code.
